seo.title: Top 50 Machine Learning Interview Questions 2026 | ML Engineer Prep
seo.description: Master the top 50 Machine Learning interview questions for 2026. Covers ML algorithms, deep learning, feature engineering, model evaluation, and MLOps.
seo.keywords: machine learning interview questions 2026, ML engineer interview, deep learning interview questions, data science interview, neural network interview

hero.title: Machine Learning Interview Questions 2026
hero.description: Comprehensive ML interview preparation covering classical ML, deep learning, model evaluation, and production MLOps — for data scientists and ML engineers.

topTips: Always start answers with the intuition before the math — interviewers want to see understanding.
Know when NOT to use deep learning: when data is small, tabular, or interpretability is required.
Practice deriving the bias-variance decomposition — this separates experienced candidates from beginners.
Be able to explain your model choices in terms of business impact, not just technical metrics.
Know XGBoost/LightGBM deeply — they win most tabular ML competitions and are widely used in industry.
